affectionate and base.
34-37. EFFECTS OF BIRTH IN SAGITTARIUS ASCENDANT. One born in Sagittarius Ascendant
will have big teeth and prominent forehead, will patronize dependents, be courageous,
strong, just, will have very fat thighs and belly, be skillful in Shastras, be of high intelligence,
be irascible, short tempered even with mighty men, be important among the men of his race,
will destroy enemies, be famous through battles, will fault his relatives, be interested in fine
arts etc., will have own profession, will do good to his men, be splendourous, be afflicted with
facial and eye diseases, will earn wealth through royal favours and be virtuous.
38-41. EFFECTS OF BIRTH IN CAPRICORN ASCENDANT. One born in Capricorn Ascendant
will have an emaciated body, be timid, will have a face, akin to that of a deer, be troubled by
windy diseases, will have a bright and elevated nose, be not mighty, will have many sons, be
